tools.name: tools_ssl_check
tools.description: Free public API. Check the TLS certificate of any public hostname. Returns issuer, subject, validity dates, days until expiry, full chain, cipher, protocol, and SAN list. No Bearer required.

tools.name: tools_dns_record_lookup
tools.description: Free public API. Look up DNS records (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, NS, SOA) for any domain.

tools.name: tools_whois_lookup
tools.description: Free public API. WHOIS / RDAP lookup for a domain — registrar, status, created/updated/expires dates, nameservers.

tools.name: tools_cname_lookup
tools.description: Free public API. Resolve a hostname's CNAME chain. Useful for debugging custom-domain CNAME setups.

tools.name: tools_http_header_checker
tools.description: Free public API. Fetch a URL and return its response headers + security grade based on common security headers.

tools.name: tools_dns_propagation_checker
tools.description: Free public API. Query the same hostname across ~10 public DNS resolvers worldwide and report which ones return the same answer. Useful right after a DNS change.

tools.name: tools_redirect_checker
tools.description: Free public API. Follow a URL's redirect chain and return every hop with status code, response time, final destination.

tools.name: tools_spf_record_checker
tools.description: Free public API. Look up and validate the SPF record for a domain. Counts void/total DNS lookups, flags syntax issues, validates against RFC 7208's 10-lookup limit.

tools.name: tools_domain_age_checker
tools.description: Free public API. Returns a domain's registration date, age in days + years, last-updated date, and expiration.

tools.name: tools_subdomain_finder
tools.description: Free public API. Enumerate subdomains for a target domain via Certificate Transparency logs + DNS resolution.

tools.name: tools_reverse_ip_lookup
tools.description: Free public API. Reverse-DNS (PTR) lookup for an IP address. Returns one or more hostnames if configured.

tools.name: tools_dmarc_record_checker
tools.description: Free public API. Look up the DMARC record at _dmarc.<domain>, parse policy/alignment/reporting tags, flag missing or too-permissive settings.

tools.name: tools_txt_record_lookup
tools.description: Free public API. Fetch all TXT records on a domain, classifying each as SPF, DKIM, DMARC, BIMI, verification token, or general.

tools.name: tools_website_status_checker
tools.description: Free public API. Check if a website is up or down. Returns HTTP status, response time, final URL after redirects, basic SSL info.

tools.name: tools_dkim_record_checker
tools.description: Free public API. Look up the DKIM record at <selector>._domainkey.<domain>, parse the public key, flag issues.

tools.name: tools_domain_availability_checker
tools.description: Free public API. Check availability of a name across one or more TLDs. Pass a `name` (no TLD) and an optional `tlds` array.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "tools_ssl_check" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Free public API. Check the TLS certificate of any public hostname. Returns issuer, subject, validity dates, days until expiry, full chain, cipher, protocol, and…
